creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

thank you for submitting this update but I already committed it.
Actually the PR you refer to was not lost: you submitted
ports/180416 on July, 9th and I committed it on July 10th.
See the full history here:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=180416

portsreinstall is already at version 3.0.2 in the ports
tree as you can see here:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/ports-mgmt/portsreinstall/

Hence there is no action to take here and if you agree I can
close this PR.

Regards,
Frederic
